zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Theobald Russell於大約1285年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特金斯頓 羅素時，他的父親Sir William Russell49歲，母親Jane Peverell17歲。他於大約1312年與Eleanor de la Tour在英國薩默塞特諾斯 卡德波利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1340年8月11日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特諾斯 卡德波利享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: Russell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: of Norman origin, from Old French and Anglo-Norman French r(o)ussel, a diminutive of Old French rous(e) ‘red, reddish’, used either as a nickname for someone with red hair or a ruddy complexion, or as a personal name. Compare Rouse . This Norman name has been established in Ireland since the 12th century. It has been reinforced in Britain and Ireland by Huguenot bearers of the name Roussel, of the same Old French origin.

English: habitational name from any of several places called Rushall (Norfolk, Staffordshire, Wiltshire) or possibly sometimes from Rusthall in Speldhurst (Kent). Rushall in Staffordshire derives from Old English rysc ‘rush, rushes’ + halh ‘nook, corner of land’. Rushall in Norfolk derives from an uncertain first element + Old English halh. Rushall in Wiltshire derives from an Old English personal name Rust (genitive Rustes) + halh. Rusthall in Speldhurst (Kent) probably derives from Old English rust ‘rust, rust color’ + wella ‘well, spring, stream’, but with a change in the final element due to influence from Middle English, Old English hall ‘hall, residence’, perhaps referring to a nearby building.
Americanized form of German Rüssel, from a pet form of any of various personal names formed with the element hrōd ‘fame, renown’.

variants.name: Russler
meanings: occupational name for a farmer, from an agent derivative of rüsseln ‘to shallow plow’.

variants.name: Rouse
meanings: English: nickname for a person with red hair or a ruddy complexion, from Middle English, Anglo-Norman French rous(e) ‘red(-haired)’ (from Latin russ(e)us).
Walloon and northern French (Rousé): variant of Rosé (see Rose ).

variants.name: Russel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Russell  .
German: from a pet form of Russ, see Russ 2.
northwest German (Rüssel): probably a variant of Rossel .

nameMeanings.name: Theobald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from þeud ‘people, race’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. The first element was altered under the influence of Greek theos ‘god’. This name was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Theobald Russell was born about 1285, in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Russell, was 49 and his mother, Jane Peverell, was 17. He married Eleanor de la Tour about 1312, in North Cadbury, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 11 August 1340, in North Cadbury, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

Il a épousé Eleanor de la Tour environ 1312, à North Cadbury, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Theobald Russellが約1285年にイギリスイギリスドールセトキングストン ルセルで生まれた時，父Sir William Russellは49歳，母Jane Peverellは17歳であった。約1312年にイギリスソメルセトノース カドブリーでEleanor de la Tourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1340年8月11日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトノース カドブリーで56歳で死去した。

ko.Killed in attack on Helen's Point: 미국 인디애나 주 포시 포인트 타운시프
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Theobald Russell(이)가 대략 1285년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 킨그스턴 러셀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Russell(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Peverell(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1312년 영국 서머세트 노르스 카드버이에서 Eleanor de la Tour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1340년 8월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 노르스 카드버이에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Theobald Russell родился около 1285 г. в местности кингстон расселл, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Russell было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Peverell, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de la Tour около 1312 г. в местности норт кадбури, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 11 августа 1340 г. в местности норт кадбури, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.
